books.title: The Deluge
books.author: Henryk Sienkiewicz
books.summary: A Swedish invasion of 17th century Poland threatens the entire Commonwealth.

books.title: Ivanhoe
books.author: Walter Scott
books.summary: A disinherited knight returns from the Crusades and fights back against Prince John’s reign.

books.title: Twenty Years at Hull House
books.author: Jane Addams
books.summary: Jane Addams’ autobiographical account of the founding and operation of Hull House, one of America’s most famous settlement homes.

books.title: Personal Recollections of Joan of Arc
books.author: Mark Twain
books.summary: A fictional biography of Joan of Arc from her early teenage years to her martyrdom.

books.title: The Wonderful Adventures of Nils
books.author: Selma Lagerlöf
books.summary: Nils Holgersson, transformed to an elf, learns the meaning of kindness during his adventures with a flock of wild geese.

books.title: All’s Well That Ends Well
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: A woman tricks her husband into fulfilling his marriage demands.

books.title: The Power of Darkness
books.author: Leo Tolstoy
books.summary: Two Russian peasants tragically succumb to selfish, immoral temptations.

books.title: The Book of Wonder
books.author: Lord Dunsany
books.summary: A collection of fantastical short stories.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Leonid Andreyev
books.summary: A collection of Leonid Andreyev’s translated short stories, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The King in Yellow
books.author: Robert W. Chambers
books.summary: Ten short stories of madness, hauntings, romance, and art.

books.title: The Mirror of the Sea
books.author: Joseph Conrad
books.summary: An autobiographical memoir on Joseph Conrad’s maritime experiences and his relationship with the sea.

books.title: The Murder of Roger Ackroyd
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A legendary Belgian detective comes out of retirement to investigate a friend’s murder.

books.title: The Life of Buffalo Bill
books.author: William F. Cody
books.summary: The 1879 autobiography of William F. Cody, more commonly known as Buffalo Bill, detailing his early life in the American West.

books.title: Mary Olivier: A Life
books.author: May Sinclair
books.summary: A gifted young woman born into a strict upper middle class Victorian family struggles for decades to balance duty to her controlling mother with a driving need to learn and to create her art.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Ambrose Bierce
books.summary: A collection of Ambrose Bierce’s poetry.

books.title: A Woman of No Importance
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.summary: A mother’s secretive past clashes with high society when her son is offered an irresistible position with a charismatic nobleman.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Ray Bradbury
books.summary: A collection of science fiction and fantasy stories by Ray Bradbury ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Dubliners
books.author: James Joyce
books.summary: Fifteen short stories about middle-class life in early 20th-century Dublin.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: George MacDonald
books.summary: A collection of George MacDonald’s fairy tales, short stories, and novellas.

books.title: Travel Essays
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.summary: A collection of Robert Louis Stevenson’s travel essays.
